markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on growth initiatives, content performance, and OKR alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Newsletter Paused:** The newsletter is paused after the next edition for a full review. Its unclear branding (generalist vs. Augment-focused) and low conversion rate are the primary issues.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Reddit Strategy Defined:** Reddit engagement will target two scenarios: competitor failure posts (offering Augment as a solution) and relevant technical discussions (positioning Augment as a helpful tool).](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Content Focus Shift:** Content strategy is now split between recovering underperforming articles and creating new ones, a change driven by recent success in reviving old content.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [**OKR Alignment:** GrowthX will draft a second OKR and begin weekly status updates to align with the company's new OKR cadence, starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

## Topics

### Newsletter Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The newsletter's branding is confusing.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Generalist Content:** Topics like "OpenAI ad class" feel out of place under the "Augment" brand, causing audience confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Ineffective CTA:** The newsletter is not leveraged as a soft conversion on the website, despite its branding.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [**Decision:** Pause the newsletter after the next edition to review its purpose and format.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [**Path Forward:**](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [**Option 1 (Augment-Branded):** Rebrand to focus exclusively on Augment content, with success measured by direct signups.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [**Option 2 (Generalist):** Decouple from the Augment brand and repurpose content as public guides.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### Reddit Engagement Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The current Reddit strategy lacks focus and a clear path to drive referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Solution:** Focus on two specific engagement scenarios:](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
    1.  [**Competitor Failure:** Respond to posts where users are unhappy with a competitor, positioning Augment as a better alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
    2.  **Relevant Technical Discussions:** Engage in threads about building specific backend systems (e.g., Rust microservices).
          - [**Model:** Answer the user's question directly, then offer Augment as a tool that can simplify the process, similar to Pusher's "WebSocket in a box" approach.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

### Content & Website Performance

  - [**Content Strategy:** Now split between recovering underperforming articles and creating new ones.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Recent manual rewrites of old articles successfully revived their traffic, proving the value of this approach.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Website Conversion:** Recent changes (e.g., TLDRs, FAQs) are expected to improve signups.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Blog Design Bug:** A recent PR caused an unintended design change (e.g., header font size) on the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will revert the PR immediately to fix the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

### OKR Alignment

  - [**Goal:** Integrate GrowthX into the company's new weekly OKR update cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX will provide a status update on their OKRs each Wednesday, using the same format as the internal team.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [Draft the second OKR and define its tracking metrics by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [Revert the blog design PR immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
      - [Pause the newsletter after the next edition and prepare a new strategy for review.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Begin weekly OKR status updates next Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [**Sylvain:**](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
      - [Have Aja review the new Augie workflows this week.](https://fathom.video/share/avFZY9fLHds899WMjSJMqUdNHDfPHFAq?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
